arts.ttl: Tottenham, Chelsea 'resurrect' Axel Disasi deal despite defender's 'reluctance' to join Spurs
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly back in the hunt for the loan signature of Chelsea defender Axel Disasi, who is said to currently favour a move to Aston Villa.

Tottenham are trying to revive their deal to sign Chelsea defender Axel Disasi - as north London side look to recruit a defender on deadline day
arts.sum: Tottenham are trying to revive their deal to sign Axel Disasi from Chelsea, Mail Sport understands.

arts.ttl: How much money Chelsea are now set to receive from AC Milan for Joao Felix loan, it's more than Renato Veiga deal - Fabrizio Romano
Chelsea agree fee to buy Sporting CP midfielder – Staying where he is until summer
arts.sum: Chelsea can be relied upon in recent years to keep things going at the end of the transfer window, and they’re not letting anyone down in this winter market. The Blues remain active on a number of fronts, with multiple incomings and outgoings possible before the end of play this evening. arts.ttl: Chelsea enquire over Sporting Lisbon teenager Dario Essugo - as Blues look to bring in midfield reinforcements on deadline day
arts.sum: Essugo, 19, has spent the season on loan with Spanish outfit Las Palmas and has impressed with his displays in the heart of midfield throughout 2024-25.
